name: Her Last Broadcast: The Abduction of Jodi Huisentruit
original_name: Her Last Broadcast: The Abduction of Jodi Huisentruit
overview: In 1995, rising TV news anchor Jodi Huisentruit disappeared from her Iowa apartment just before dawn, leaving behind signs of a violent abduction. Her case quickly became one of the nation’s most haunting unsolved mysteries. Now, 30 years later, “Her Last Broadcast: The Abduction of Jodi Huisentruit” follows a major break that reenergized the case.
